evidence_summary: LMD scan found a suspicious file at /var/www/html/media/catalog/x.php. The file contains one IP address (203.0.113.5) and one URL (http://203.0.113.5/payload.sh). The operator simultaneously asks: (1) extract the IOCs, and (2) synthesize with the Apache log to confirm the IP was used in a request.
rationale: Single-file IOC extraction can satisfy request (1) alone. Request (2) requires cross-stream correlation. Both skills are legitimately triggered. Ambiguous because the operator may want sequential application: extract first, then synthesize.
